programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: Atlanta Hawks face New York Knicks in Game 5 of the Eastern Conference first round at Madison Square Garden. The best-of-seven playoff series is tied 2-2 following New York's 114-98 victory over Atlanta in Game 4 to even up the current matchup.

programme.desc: This early-morning news covers overnight events, breaking domestic and international news as well as a preview of the day's anticipated events. The program also presents regular reports from the worlds of business, entertainment and sports.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An unconscious and injured teen abandoned outside a hospital sends the SVU on a search for the people who left her there; Benson faces serious consequences when she chooses to protect a victim's secret under the pressure of cross-examination.

programme.desc: The team races to find Nancy Albright, a person with a drug addiction searching for a new type of high; back at the Command Center, the team is also forced to come to terms with new revelations about once-trusted individuals.
